content.mi:
Te Karanga ki te Moana

E tū mokemoke ana ia i te tahatika, ka hiki a Te Tahi i ōna ringa ki te rangi.

Ka karanga ia ki a Tangaroa, ki ngā taniwha o te hōhonu, ki ngā mea tawhito o te moana.

I rere tōna reo i runga i ngā ngaru pēnei i te whatitiri.

Ā, i te pōuriuri o te moana ka ara ake tētahi mea nui—

Tūtarakauika

te rangatira o ngā tohorā
content.en:
Calling the Sea

Standing alone on the shore, Te Tahi lifted his hands to the sky.

He called upon Tangaroa, upon the taniwha of the deep, upon the ancient creatures of the ocean.

His voice rolled across the waves like thunder.

And from the darkness of the sea rose a mighty figure—

Tūtarakauika

the chief of whales
